basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 Project Fellow Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with MSc in Microbiology qualification can directly attend the interview on 05-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation to entitled categories as per rules.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NISER Project Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Fellow position at NISER Bhubaneswar is scheduled for 05 June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Fellow post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Project Fellow position is an MSc in Microbiology. Candidates must possess this degree to be eligible for the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided to eligible categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Fellow position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Fellow post at the National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates from all categories can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Fellow recruitment will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the National Institute of Science Education and Research Bhubaneswar (NISER), Odisha, 752050.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position. The recruitment is for a Project Fellow role on a contractual basis.
